name: Info - Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: Minc Cut red and green peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the wild rice with sliced green onions.
2. Prepare fresh pasta made with basil, peppercorns, spinach or tomatoes.
3. Boil new potatoes and toss with chopped Italian parsley or chives.
4. Make couscous mixed with minced red and green peppers.
5. Add flavorings such as big dashes of Tabasco Sauce, finely chopped canned jalapeno peppers, generous pinches of cumin, curry powder, and coriander, and cracked black or white peppercorns to the dish.
